name: Talon.One Promotion Engine API
what_it_does: Talon.One enterprise promotion engine REST API for large e-commerce and retail companies to create and manage complex, rule-based promotions, loyalty programs, referrals, and cart-level incentives with real-time evaluation at scale for personalized commerce automation. Enables AI agents to manage promotion campaign creation for enterprise incentive automation, handle customer session and event tracking for promotion eligibility automation, access rule-based promotion evaluation for real-time discount automation, retrieve loyalty program management and tier progression for enterprise retention automation, manage referral tracking and reward for viral commerce automation, handle bundle and cart-level promotion for complex checkout discount automation, access AB testing and promotion analytics for optimization automation, retrieve customer attribute management for segmentation-based promotion automation, manage multi-application promotion orchestration for platform automation, and integrate Talon.One with Shopify, SAP, Salesforce, and enterprise commerce platforms for end-to-end enterprise promotion automation.
use_cases: Evaluating complex promotion rules at checkout from enterprise discount agents
Managing loyalty tier progression from enterprise retention automation agents
Running multi-brand promotion orchestration from enterprise commerce agents
Personalizing incentives by customer segment from promotion optimization agents
not_for: SMB simple discount codes (use Voucherify or native platform for simple discounts)
Basic loyalty stamp cards (Talon.One is complex rule-based, enterprise tier)
Email-centric promotions (use Klaviyo or Braze for email-driven promotions)
best_when: An enterprise retailer or e-commerce platform wanting AI agents to automate complex rule-based promotion evaluation, loyalty tier management, and personalized incentive delivery at scale through Talon.One's enterprise promotion engine.
avoid_when: IMPLEMENTATION REQUIRES TALON.ONE TEAM: Talon.One enterprise implementation requires engagement with Talon.One professional services for campaign modeling; automated self-service complex promotion creation requires deep platform knowledge; automated standalone integration without PS engagement creates misconfigured promotion rules. SESSION-BASED EVALUATION MODEL: Talon.One promotion evaluation uses customer sessions (open, update, close lifecycle); automated checkout must properly manage session lifecycle; automated session not closed before evaluation creates stale promotion state. RULE CONDITION COMPLEXITY TESTING: Talon.One promotion rules can be complex (customer attributes, cart contents, history); automated promotion changes must be tested in sandbox before production; automated untested rule changes create unexpected promotion behavior at scale. API RATE LIMITS FOR HIGH-TRAFFIC EVALUATION: Talon.One promotion evaluation is called per-checkout; automated high-volume checkout must stay within rate limits; automated unlimited concurrency creates rate limit exceeded during traffic spikes.

auth.notes: Talon.One uses API key with application-level auth for API access. REST API with JSON. Berlin, Germany HQ. Founded 2015 by Christoph Fuchs and Sebastian Mundry. Backed by Felicis, Salesforce Ventures, Target Global ($105M raised). Products: Promotion engine, loyalty, referrals, bundles, cart-level promotions, A/B testing. SDKs: Node.js, Python, PHP, Java, .NET, Go. GDPR. SOC2. Serves enterprise e-commerce and retail. Competes with Voucherify for enterprise promotions.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise sales process required
pricing.paid_tiers: Custom enterprise pricing; typically $2,500-$20,000+/month by API calls
pricing.notes: Berlin DE. Felicis/Salesforce Ventures backed. Enterprise pricing by API call volume. Annual contract typical.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; session evaluation APIs have per-second limits; webhooks for campaign, loyalty, and referral events

known_agent_gotchas: SESSION LIFECYCLE MANAGEMENT: Talon.One uses customer sessions (createOrUpdateCustomerSession) that must be properly closed; automated checkout must close session after evaluation; automated unclosed sessions create stale promotion state and inaccurate analytics

APPLICATION vs MANAGEMENT API SEPARATION: Talon.One has Application API (for real-time evaluation) and Management API (for campaign setup); automated checkout uses Application API; automated campaign management uses Management API; automated wrong API for context creates permission or feature mismatch

CUSTOMER PROFILE ATTRIBUTE RICHNESS FOR TARGETING: Talon.One promotion targeting uses customer attributes; automated promotion eligibility quality depends on customer attribute completeness; automated promotion evaluation with sparse customer attributes creates generic (non-personalized) promotion application

EFFECTS ARRAY PROCESSING: Talon.One evaluation returns 'effects' array describing what should happen (discount, loyalty points, etc.); automated checkout must interpret and apply each effect; automated effect array ignored creates promotion evaluated but not applied

CAMPAIGN STATUS MANAGEMENT: Talon.One campaigns must be in Active status to be evaluated; automated campaign launch must change status from Draft to Active; automated evaluation against Draft campaign creates no promotion effects without error indication
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise promotions. GDPR, SOC2. API key. EU/US. Customer loyalty and promotion data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise promotions. GDPR, SOC2. API key. EU. Promotion and customer data.
